STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BROT: Whenever another player plays a [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], return your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] from discard, draw, or exhaust to your [gold]Hand[/gold] (if none, do nothing).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SERP: Whenever any player plays a [gold]Snakebite[/gold], all players gain [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever any player plays a [gold]Snakebite[/gold], all players gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_TIGE: Whenever you play two consecutive [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] cards of different types, draw.

Whenever you play two consecutive [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] cards of different types, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
Last: {TigerFlowLastType:choose(None|Attack|Skill|Power):—|Attack|Skill|Power}. [blue]{TigerFlowStepsUntilDraw}[/blue] step(s) until trigger.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CHEC: If you play no [gold]Attack[/gold] by the end of your player turn, [gold]at the end of the players' turn[/gold]: you suffer a next-turn penalty and the caster gains a next-turn benefit.

At the end of your player turn, if you played no [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]at the end of the players' turn[/gold]: you lose {DpsTargetEnergyLoss:energyIcons()} [gold]Energy[/gold] next turn and draw [blue]{DpsDrawFewerNextHand}[/blue] fewer card(s) next hand; the caster gains {DpsCasterEnergyNextTurn:energyIcons()} [gold]Energy[/gold] and draws [blue]{DpsCasterDrawNextTurn}[/blue] extra card(s) next turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CORP: [gold]At the end of a player's turn[/gold], they lose HP, then this is removed.
[gold]At the end of a player's turn[/gold], they lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then this is removed.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BOUN: When killed, the killing player gains [gold]Gold[/gold] from its Max HP (capped).
When this unit is killed, the player who dealt the killing blow gains [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to its Max HP, up to [blue]{BountyGoldCap}[/blue].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_DOUB: Take double damage from [gold]Attacks[/gold] this turn.
Take double damage from [gold]Attacks[/gold] this turn{Amount:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue] times}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SHAR: Gain [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_HANG: Next turn start at 0 [gold]Energy[/gold]; gain [gold]No Draw[/gold] and [gold]Ringing[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_PER_: During your current player phase, spending [gold]Energy[/gold] channels random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold].
During your current player phase, whenever you spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold].
